AI1.title: Deep Learning and NLP - קורס למידה עמוקה ועיבוד שפות טבעיות
AI1.note: Full Hebrew-spoken university course covering deep learning and natural language processing, including sequence models and language modeling.

AI1.title: עיבוד שפות טבעיות (Natural Language Processing)
AI1.note: Hebrew-spoken NLP lecture series covering word representations, sequence models and core language processing methods.

AI1.title: Transformer Models and BERT Model - בעברית
AI1.note: Hebrew-narrated course on the transformer architecture, attention and BERT; free to audit.

AI2.title: Reinforcement Learning 1 - למידה מונחית חיזוקים
AI2.note: Hebrew-spoken university course on reinforcement learning.

AI2.title: מבוא לבינה מלאכותית: מתאוריה לפרקטיקה
AI2.note: Free Hebrew video course; includes a unit on reinforcement learning (general AI fallback).

AI3.title: Deep Learning and NLP - קורס למידה עמוקה ועיבוד שפות טבעיות
AI3.note: Hebrew-spoken deep learning course covering neural networks and representation learning used in computer vision.

AI3.title: למידת מכונה (Machine Learning)
AI3.note: Hebrew-spoken machine learning lecture series foundational to deep learning and vision.

AI4.title: מבוא למדעי הנתונים: כלים ושיטות
AI4.provider: HIT - Holon Institute of Technology (Campus IL)
AI4.note: Free Hebrew video course on data acquisition, automated data analysis in Python and introductory machine learning methods.

AI4.title: למידת מכונה (Machine Learning)
AI4.note: Hebrew-spoken machine learning lecture series; methods that scale to large datasets.

AI5.title: Introduction to Generative AI - בעברית
AI5.note: Hebrew-narrated introduction to generative AI and how it differs from traditional machine learning; free to audit.

AI5.title: Deep Learning and NLP - קורס למידה עמוקה ועיבוד שפות טבעיות
AI5.note: Hebrew-spoken deep learning course providing the generative-model foundations (GANs, autoencoders, sequence generation).

AI6.title: רובוטים אוטונומיים (Autonomous Robots)
AI6.note: Free Hebrew video course on autonomous robotics: navigation, mapping and obstacle detection.
